message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

participant "TaskExecutionStrategy" as TaskExecutionStrategy
participant "Action" as Action
participant "Connection" as Connection
boundary "SSH client/server connection" as SSHClientServer
control "ssh daemon (or winrm service)" as sshDaemon

TaskExecutionStrategy -> Action: init(..)
TaskExecutionStrategy -> Action: init(..)
TaskExecutionStrategy -> Action: run()

Action -> Connection: put_file()
Connection -> SSHClientServer: transfer module data
SSHClientServer -> sshDaemon: 
activate sshDaemon
sshDaemon -> sshDaemon: save module to disk
sshDaemon --> SSHClientServer: 
deactivate sshDaemon
SSHClientServer --> Connection: transfer complete
Connection --> Action: return remote path

Action -> Connection: exec_command()
Connection -> SSHClientServer: run module remotely
SSHClientServer -> sshDaemon: 
activate sshDaemon
sshDaemon -> sshDaemon: execute shell command
sshDaemon --> SSHClientServer: 
deactivate sshDaemon
SSHClientServer --> Connection: return response code, stdout, stderr
Connection --> Action: return response code, stdout, stderr
Action --> TaskExecutionStrategy: return JSON

@enduml
```
